About Me

Reliable. Organized. Tech-Savvy.

I'm a 2nd-year BSIT student at Davao del Norte State College with hands-on experience in virtual assistance, administrative support, e-commerce operations, and web development.

Whether organizing documents for a government office, coordinating remote events, managing an online store, or building full-stack web systems — I bring the same level of dedication and attention to detail to everything I do.

I'm continuously expanding my technical skills while staying grounded in my core strength: being someone people can rely on.

Web Development

Building full-stack web systems with HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, JavaScript, PHP, Laravel, and MySQL.

Virtual Assistance

Data entry, email management, online research, administrative support, and customer service.

Video Editing

Creating engaging video content for social media with transitions, captions, and visual effects.

Event Coordination

Managing schedules, coordinating communications, and ensuring smooth event execution.
